studies.title:
Effectiveness of Priovi, A Digital Self-help Tool, In Patients with Borderline
Personality Disorder – a single-blinded Randomized Controlled Trial (EPADIP-
BPD)

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product 'priovi', as evidenced by the title and detailed description in the trial registration, which matches the product name and its purpose for treating borderline personality disorder.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a single-blinded randomized controlled trial, which involves random allocation of participants to an intervention group and a control group, fulfilling the criteria for an RCT.
